title: Kilauan Mikro di Rak Detergen
theme: Menemukan keajaiban kecil dan koneksi tak terduga dalam rutinitas sehari-hari, membangkitkan rasa ingin tahu akan dunia di sekitar kita.

cover.prompt: A 24-hour convenience store named 'Minimarket Bintang' at a street intersection during a peaceful evening. A lone automatic scooter is parked in front. A subtle silhouette of a person stands near the scooter, holding a warm beverage sachet. Gentle lighting from the store illuminates the immediate area, contrasting with the soft twilight hues of the calm evening sky.
cover.style: Minimalist composition, strong silhouettes, gentle lighting

meta.plan_summary: A part-time courier observes mysterious micro-glimmers in a 24-hour convenience store, discovering they react to human emotions and positive interactions. These glimmers become most vibrant during an act of sincere kindness between a child and a grandmother, transforming his perception of everyday places into canvases of human connection.
meta.target_emotion: Uplifted, warmth, wonder, subtle introspection, connection
